items.title: Anthropic - Claude Sonnet 4.6 Release
items.author: www.anthropic.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has been on a rapid release cadence in 2026, launching major Claude model upgrades roughly every two weeks. The headline releases are Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Claude Opus 4.6 — both significant leaps over their predecessors. Sonnet 4.6 brings enhanced coding, computer use, long-context reasoning (1M token context window in beta), agent planning, and design capabilities. Opus 4.6 tops the Finance Agent benchmark and achieves a remarkable 14.5-hour autonomous task completion horizon, the lo

items.title: Claude Code Changelog
items.author: github.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has released several significant API updates in early 2026. Most notably, Claude Sonnet 4.6 has launched as the latest balanced model, delivering improved agentic search performance with fewer tokens consumed, and supports extended thinking alongside a 1M token context window (now in beta). The 1M token context window has also been extended to Claude Opus 4.6. Structured outputs have moved to general availability for Claude Sonnet 4.5, Claude Opus 4.5, and Claude Haiku 4.5, with expand

items.title: Claude API Release Notes
items.author: docs.anthropic.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has been active with major announcements in early 2026. In March, they announced a $100 million investment into the Claude Partner Network (March 12) and introduced The Anthropic Institute (March 11), alongside hosting their inaugural Partner Summit 2026. On the model front, a new flagship Sonnet model was released on March 5 with frontier-level performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional workloads. Earlier in 2026, Claude Opus 4.6 launched in February as the industry-le

items.title: Anthropic on X — The Anthropic Institute
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Anthropic's most recent major Twitter/X announcements in March 2026 include the launch of The Anthropic Institute, described as a new effort to advance the public conversation about powerful AI, and the publication of a new constitution for Claude — a detailed document outlining Claude's vision, behavior, and values, written primarily for Claude and used directly in its training process. Anthropic also announced a massive $30B funding round at a $380B post-money valuation, which the company says

items.title: Anthropic Economic Index: January 2026 Report
items.author: www.anthropic.com
items.snippet:
Anthropic has published several notable research papers and reports in early 2026. On the economic front, they released 'Labor market impacts of AI: A new measure and early evidence' (March 5, 2026) by Maxim Massenkoff and Peter McCrory, introducing a new framework for quantifying AI's effect on labor markets. They also published the 'Anthropic Economic Index: Learning Curves' report on March 24, 2026, and introduced new building blocks for understanding AI use patterns across their platform.

O
